---
title: "Data Governance and Policy"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
    page-layout: article
    output-file: 01-data_governance_and_policy.html
  revealjs:
    output-file: 01-data_governance_and_policy.revealjs.html
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: true
    preview-links: auto
editor: visual
---

## stuff

stuff about stuff
